payload.answer: Architecture takeaways extracted: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest performance-saturating model remain open questions.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
payload.decision: Commit explicit architecture decisions; preserve open questions as unresolved, not current facts.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity identifiers were provided; extracted entities are named directly from the source.

payload.intent: extract durable architectural takeaways from chat summary

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the personal memory system.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection, not the source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while still saturating performance.

details: Committed three explicit architecture decisions as durable memory candidates.
Recorded two open questions without treating them as decided facts.
No conflicts or superseded/deleted facts detected.
